message:
fix(cli): remove dead include, fix usage output stream

- Remove unused #include <asx/cli/cli.h>
- Fix print_usage() to accept FILE* parameter: intentional help
  requests (asx help, --help) write to stdout; error cases (no args,
  unknown command) write to stderr. Previously all usage went to
  stderr, making `asx help > file` produce an empty file.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
